title: PMW: Particles Redone
description: This resource packs main goal is to redo the protomanlys weather particles. Offering actively redone snow and rain!
body:
This texturepacks job is to change the particle files of Protomanly's weather and give the user a different experience.

The biggest keypoints are the redone snow and rain. The rain particles are noticably smaller and not so much in they way as they used to be. The snow particles are more detailed and offer a better viewing experience for the user.

To do list:
- Finish remaking smoke particles
- Remake fire particles
- _MAYBE_ dabble into changing the wall cloud and tornado noise

**THIS TEXTUREPACK REQUIRES PROTOMANLYS WEATHER**
